chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-684 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Shah Rizvi, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Tanveer Abass Shah, Advocate for the respondent/ SEPCO. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
